name: nigeria-mcp
description: Nigerian data for AI agents — MCP servers for trade statistics, FX rates, bank-account resolve, electricity meter validation, administrative boundaries, states & LGAs, health facilities, World Bank / IMF / UN-SDG indicators, crypto tickers, and sanctions screening. A Braynex Services Ltd product.
author: Samuel Orie <braynexservices@gmail.com> (Braynex Services Ltd — https://www.braynexservices.com)

scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run eval
